summary: Frontend-only testing completed for NT Commerce POS improvements. All 5 requested features verified: 1) Thermal printer size option (58mm/80mm) in Settings > Printer tab - WORKING, 2) System Alerts section in SaaS Admin - WORKING with MOCK data, 3) POS mobile responsive (375x667) - WORKING with mobile quick actions bar, 4) Admin dashboard mobile responsive - WORKING with 2-column stat cards, 5) Mobile sidebar navigation - WORKING with hamburger menu
critical_code_review_comments: Thermal printer size option (58mm/80mm) properly implemented with visual selection feedback and purple highlight
System Alerts section uses MOCK data - works correctly with 4 mock errors displayed
POS page mobile view hides left sidebar task menu and shows quick actions bar instead
Mobile sidebar uses icon-only collapsed view for navigation
All responsive breakpoints working correctly (md:hidden, sm:hidden classes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 features verified working: 1) Settings > Printer tab has thermal_printer_size option with 58mm/80mm buttons that toggle selection state with purple highlight, 2) SaaS Admin > Alerts tab shows SystemAlertsSection component with mock errors, stats cards, auto-fix toggle, filter dropdown, and quick maintenance actions, 3) POS page at 375x667 viewport shows mobile quick actions bar (منتج/إرجاع/زبون/history buttons) and hides desktop sidebar, 4) SaaS Admin at 375x667 shows 2-column stat cards grid and horizontal scrollable tabs, 5) Mobile sidebar opens from hamburger menu with icon-only navigation

thermal_printer_size.details: Two clickable buttons for 58mm (طابعة صغيرة) and 80mm (طابعة قياسية) with purple highlight on selection

system_alerts_section.details: Shows 4 mock errors with severity badges, timestamps, auto-fix/manual buttons. USES MOCK DATA as noted in requirements

pos_mobile_responsive.details: Left sidebar hidden, mobile quick actions bar visible with منتج/إرجاع/زبون buttons

admin_dashboard_mobile.details: Stats displayed in 2-column grid, tabs scroll horizontally

mobile_sidebar.details: Opens from hamburger, shows icon-only navigation, has X close button
